text: [ By Alah, AHSR bin Al led large battalions fike mountains against Muaviya. “Arr bin AlAs said (to Muawya), I surely see batalions which wil ot tum back before kiling their opponents.” Muawiya who was really the best of the two men said to him, *O “Amr! If these killed those and those: Kiled these, who would be left with me for the job of the publio, who would be left with me for their women, who wouid be left with me for their ohicren?” Then Muawiya sent two Quraishi men from the tibe of “Abd- ‘Shams called “Abdur Rahman bin Sumura and “Abulah bin ‘Amir bin Kuraiz to ALH8B8R) saying o them, “Go to this man (ic. AlHESEN) and negotiate ‘peace with him and talk and appeal to him." So, they went to AL Hg#a and talked and appealed to him to acoept peace. ALHESN said, "We, the offspring of “Abdul Muttalib, have got wealth and people have indiged in kiling and corruption (and money only wil appease them)." They said to Al- Hasan, "Muawiya offers you 5o and so, and appeals to you and enfreats you 10 acoept peace.” Al/Ha8aN) said to them, “But who will be responsibe for ‘what you have said?" They said, "We will be responsible for it.” So, whatever AL (Hasah) asked they said, "We wil be responsible for it for you” So, Al Hésan concluded a peace treaty with Muaviya. Al HE8aR) (A Basr) said: | heard Abu Bakr saying, °| saw Alah's Apostie on the pulpit and AL Fasa bin Al was by his side. The Prophet was looking once at the people and ‘once at Al{H@s8h) bin Al saying, This son of mine is a Saiyid (Le. a noble) and may Allh make peace between two big groups of Musims through ey P T
